text: Notwithstanding its limited use on highways, a snowmobile shall not be determined a motor vehicle within the meaning of § 125 (Motor vehicles) or any other successor statutes.
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 11
#### Article 47. Registration of Snowmobiles
##### § 2229 — Snowmobile, not a motor vehicle

Notwithstanding its limited use on highways, a snowmobile shall not be determined a motor vehicle within the meaning of § 125 (Motor vehicles) or any other successor statutes.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*

subsections.text: Notwithstanding its limited use on highways, a snowmobile shall not be determined a motor vehicle within the meaning of § 125 (Motor vehicles) or any other successor statutes.
